questions.question_text: CO mapping 1 Explain how i) arrays are declared and initialized in Java ii)Reading console Input 2 Using program explain i) NullpointerException and NumberFormatException ii) variables and methods in interface 3 Explain: i)pure polymorphism ii) use of super 4 What is i)panel and frame in AWT ii) Life cycle of Thread

What are Java Buzzwords and explain the role of JVM in java?Create a class Car with attributes like model name, brand, and daily rental rate. Add a constructor to initialize the values and a method to calculate rental cost for a given number of days. In main method create 5 objects of car class using array of objects and display all details.

Explain class variable, reference variable, and constructor of a class. Create a class Book with attributes title, author, and price. Write a constructor to initialize these values and appropriate methods to set and get the details of the book. Then, create at least 5 objects of the class using array and display book details.

subparts.text: Explain: i) how to create a package and its use ii)ad hoc polymorphism and its use
Create a program to explain multiple and multilevel inheritance in java

questions.question_text: What is an abstract class? Create an abstract class Payment with an abstract method void pay. Then implement subclasses CreditCardPayment, UPIPayment, and NetBankingPayment.Show the use of final and dynamic method dispatch and display the details.

What are exceptions in java? Define a class Student with attributes studentId, name, and a list of courses. Implement a method register Course that Adds a course and throw Course Limit Exceeded Exception if the student tries to add more than 5 courses. Also show the use of throw and throws and how to rethrow an exception.
Create program to i) read the data from user through console and write the content in a file ii) define an interface, extend an interface and Nested interface
How to achieve synchronization between multiple threads in java and show how to use is alive and sleep in multithreading.
Explain i)any 3 layouts in AWT ii) how to handling key event
